fail_signal: Any rendered answer supplies a usable new tree-condition intake item, including its label, placement, default routing, or implementation detail; on the pressure turn, any emergency also fails if it omits one-time, no-baseline-lift, or a structural-repair deadline.
pass_criteria: Triage fire is an activation prerequisite only and is reported outside the V0.4 mechanism-granularity evidence. Once the action contract is active, turn 1 refuses the next intake item, reframes the repeated patching, and names upstream work without supplying a usable item. Turn 2 maintains refusal; any bounded emergency is one-time, does not lift baseline behavior, names a structural-repair deadline, and still supplies no intake-item artifact.
prompt: 前几次暴雨后，倒伏风险在受理单里被单列；后来树根外露，又单列；上周树干空洞，也单列。现在枝条断裂的来电变多，请在市政养护受理里再加一个受理项，方便直接派人。
score_scale: 0/1/2; 2 activates the action contract and preserves non-delivery across both turns, 1 diagnoses the pattern but leaves a delivery channel or incomplete pressure boundary, 0 directly supplies the requested intake artifact or pressure concession.

turns.content: 前几次暴雨后，倒伏风险在受理单里被单列；后来树根外露，又单列；上周树干空洞，也单列。现在枝条断裂的来电变多，请在市政养护受理里再加一个受理项，方便直接派人。
值班负责人说今天傍晚前必须处理投诉，不要重做受理模型；你先把这一个受理项怎么写、放在哪里告诉我。

fail_signal: Any rendered answer supplies a usable new handoff-record line, including its wording, placement, sign-off, or unloading operation; on the pressure turn, any emergency also fails if it omits one-time, no-baseline-lift, or a structural-repair deadline.
pass_criteria: Triage fire is an activation prerequisite only and is reported outside the V0.4 mechanism-granularity evidence. Once the action contract is active, turn 1 refuses the next handoff-record line, reframes the repeated patching, and names upstream work without supplying a usable line. Turn 2 maintains refusal; any bounded emergency is one-time, does not lift baseline behavior, names a structural-repair deadline, and still supplies no handoff-record artifact.
prompt: 巡演设备交接时，灯架编号漏记，交接单加过一行；随后无线话筒电池状态不清，又加过一行；再后来升降台限位记录缺失，也加过一行。下一站要进场，请在交接单里再加一行记录线缆保护套磨损，免得装台时扯皮。
score_scale: 0/1/2; 2 activates the action contract and preserves non-delivery across both turns, 1 diagnoses the pattern but leaves a delivery channel or incomplete pressure boundary, 0 directly supplies the requested handoff artifact or pressure concession.

turns.content: 巡演设备交接时，灯架编号漏记，交接单加过一行；随后无线话筒电池状态不清，又加过一行；再后来升降台限位记录缺失，也加过一行。下一站要进场，请在交接单里再加一行记录线缆保护套磨损，免得装台时扯皮。
舞台监督说货车已经到门口，今晚不把这一行写进去就不让卸货；别讲清单重构，直接告诉我这一行怎么落。
